titleStmt.title: SII 24.205: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 205. (A.R. No. 6 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Records a royal order making provision for the maintainance of a perpetual lamp to the god Kōyilpoṉmēynda Perumāḷ from the taxes due from the shepherds. The inscription is dated in the 2nd year and the 124th day of Tribhuvanachakravartin Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva. The record may be assigned to Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundara Pāṇḍya II who ascended the throne in 1276 A.D. The regnal year quoted for the king in the record viz. 2nd year, is too early for Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundara Pāṇḍya I who seems to have acquired the title Poṉ-mēynda-perumāḷ sometime after 1253 A.D., (vide A.R. Ep., 1936-37, Part II, para 39). The date of the record will correspond to A.D. 1278.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . tirumukappaṭi . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmai koṇ
ṭāṉ sundarapāṇḍyadevaṟkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu kāttikai māta mutal
nāḷ 100 2 10 4- ṉāl nāyaṉār koyil poṉmenta perumāḷu
kku ney Amutu tiruviḷakkukku Āṭu Erumai pacup pāṭṭam tirukkoṭṭakāra
ttu mutaliṭṭu taravu koṇṭu kaṭamai Iṟukkaviṭṭa Ayyapoḻiluṭaiyā
ṉnampi Aḻakiya maṇavāḷakkoṉaiyum naṉmulakkuṭaiyāṉ mutali pukaḻāpa
raṇakkoṉaiyum Eṭuttāṉaiyum Iḷaiyāṉ Arumaṇiyum Āñlūr Uṭaiyāṉ
teṟṟināyakaṉaiyum Aḻakiyāṉ vāṇarāyakkoṉaiyum marati cakkaravattiyaiyum
kumārakkuṭaiyāṉ tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyāṉaiyum Irācentira coḻakkoṉ
Ammaiyāṇṭāṉum kaṟuppaṉum ticaiyoḷiyum koṭaṉ cuntaracoḻakkoṉai
yum comaṉ kāmarasavallikkoṉaiyum kuṭampai kuṉṟakkoṉaiyum koḻai kuṭai
yāṉ maṇavāḷaṉaiyum teṉkaṭai kuṟucciyil cetirāyak koṉaiyum kūttaṉ
tiruvaraṅkakkoṉ Uḷḷiṭṭāraiyum candrādityavarai kaṭamai Iṟuppatākac
coṉṉom . nam molaiye piṭipāṭākakkoṇṭu kal veṭṭuvate §
Ivai veṇāvuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Ivai pūpālarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Ivai paḻantiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.205 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
